commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component demonstrates good data handling and hierarchy, with proper prop-based rendering and clear visual structure. However, it has inconsistent design token usage (hardcoded padding values like 24px instead of var(--ggui-spacing-*), mixed semantic color references), incomplete implementation (ForecastDayCard is cut off), and lacks interactive polish features like hover states or transitions.

violations: Hardcoded string "Sunny" found — should be a prop default
